description: Machine-readable extraction of the mutable R16 prediction workflow; no traditional knowledge changes.

rules.requirement: Freeze case inputs, question text, option text, literal predicates, event forms and reference periods before prediction.
Answer data, prior reveal, prior diagnosis and shadow rebuild must be physically inaccessible.
Derive required and conditional source families from target axis, distinctive atoms, event family, exactness, actor, action, object, reference period and strongest competitor.
Do not stop because three public evidence items or a temporary winner already exists.
Seal a Ziwei blind-axis model before option-direction challenge; bind every used parent to S05-S10 and real S06 selectors.
Challenge every option atom through support, counterevidence, alternative explanation and exact occurrence or endpoint routes.
Seal a Bazi blind-axis capability model before option-direction challenge and preserve all legal variants.
Bazi mechanisms must use independent S11-S16 parents and may not copy Ziwei facts or prose.
Create direction-neutral facts for every candidate time and legal Bazi variant before option projection.
Time intensity, transformations or relations provide stage permission only and never prove occurrence or endpoint.
Separate native raw palace, person entry, person Taiji origin and person-relative theme coordinates; only natural persons receive person Taiji.
Propagate every support, limitation and contradiction atom without erasing direction because an exact endpoint is missing.
Keep propensity, opportunity, actual occurrence and formal endpoint as separate levels.
Mechanically subtract shared atoms and identical physical facts before ranking.
Preserve per-atom support, partial support, limitation, direct contradiction, alternative explanation, time stage and exact endpoint gaps.
Generate all N*(N-1)/2 pairwise comparisons using the fixed literal decision order and derive strongest competitor mechanically.
Fusion may read only two machine-valid local seals; same choice alone gives zero gain.
Positive gain requires independent completion of the weakest formal atom or direct closure of the strongest competitor.
Always release relative TOP1 and TOP2 for a clean readable choice question, even when formal exact assertion is null.
No run may be scored without source-packet, method-packet and causal-use validation PASS.
